And what she said is going to be very hard for OpenAI to ignore.

Helen Toner. Ex-board member. The person who was in the room.

Not a rumor. Not a leak. Not an anonymous source.

THE PERSON WHO VOTED TO REMOVE HIM.

Here is what she says happened.

Sam hid the ChatGPT launch from the board entirely.

Lied about owning the OpenAI Startup Fund.

Provided falsified safety information.

Then lied to oust her after her research paper.

The board did not fire him over a disagreement.

They fired him because they said they could no longer trust a single thing he told them.

Think about what that means.

The most powerful AI company on earth.

Run by someone his own board said they could not trust.

And the world kept using the product anyway.

This is not a drama story.

This is a governance story.

And it raises one question nobody in tech wants to answer out loud.

If the people closest to him lost all trust — what does that mean for everything built on top of the decisions he made.

The AI industry does not have a technology problem.

It has a transparency problem.

And this is the loudest that problem has ever been stated on the record.

tweets.full_text:
Proactive agent that thinks and acts like you.
Multiplayer AI Brain for teams.
Proper GUI for commanding 50 agents.

https://t.co/zsDxICHezv is all three. Sauna goes live today. First 2000 people, use access code LAUNCH for $80 of weekly(!) credits.

Let’s explain. Multiplayer only works once the personal brain is powerful. So let's start here.

Personal AI Brain
3,800+ tools connected. State of the Art memory. Skills and schedules you teach once that get repeated forever on cheaper models. An AI first CRM.

Lives on the cloud so you can initiate tasks from anywhere: iMessage, Slack, Email. Also no need for a Mac mini 😉

GUI
AI agents have been stuck in their MS-DOS era. A chat box, a scroll buffer, no way to command 50 of them. We built the first GUI: Live sessions on one side, work waiting for your sign-off on the other, plus the things Sauna kicked off while you were asleep waiting for review. Game mode helps clear the queue with actual joy.

Okay so far so good, but how to give benefit of what you built to more people or whole team?

Multiplayer
Once your Sauna actually knows you and you gave her access to your tools, you can use multiplayer.

Two modes:
- Brain access. My co-founder Robert plugged my brain as a tool into his Sauna last month. He can ask it about pricing while I'm in other meetings, gets a sourced answer back, never has to interrupt me. That’s read only. Yolo mode gives him access to all my tools too :O
- Communal Saunas extend that to whole companies with proper permissioning. Folder owners decide what's true for the whole company and build skills. Most get their personal brain + read access to communal files and memories. Works also for group planning my best friend's bachelor party.

The Way
I’ve been obsessed about AI Brain since 2016. Our human brains suck at some things like memory and are brilliant at others like creativity. We are also particularly bad at thinking we are all on the same page and then realising weeks later that we weren’t. Most leaders spend their days being the human diff tool, catching contradictions in hallway conversations and Slack threads. Repeating themselves 50 times. Now every company is spinning up hundreds or thousands of agents that drift faster than humans do, feeding each other their drift as context. Compounding rot.

After 10 years and one failed company in this space we are launching the solution.

The Launch
We thought about a celebrity launch. Margot Robbie in a bathtub explaining agents. But then we realised the same money gives the first 2,000 people free daily credits, every day, until we burn through that $1,000,000.

Sauna runs Claude, GPT-5, Gemini, GLM-5.1, DeepSeek, Kimi so you can budget yourself. The labs are racing to lock you so they can milk you in a year. We picked your side.

Onboarding
It’s live at https://t.co/8ekc1ZtzoJ We’ve preheated saunas based on a niche. Use the access codes in the comments to get a better experience.

tweets.full_text:
SERV is the AI platform for launching autonomous businesses.

Today we're going multichain - introducing Solana Alpha Vaults giving $SERV holders first access.

How it works:
1. When a launch goes live, trading is locked. Only $SERV holders can deposit SOL into the vault.
2. The deposit window stays open for 21 minutes. Cap: 1 SOL per wallet.
3. The vault then atomically buys from the pool at launch price with all deposited SOL. Every depositor gets a proportional share at the same entry.
4. Trading opens to the public. Vault tokens fully unlock after 15 minutes.

Eligibility: hold 50,000 $SERV on Base or ETH at the snapshot, and link your EVM wallet to your Solana wallet before the deposit window opens.

First launch using Alpha Vault: 30/04.
Full FAQ below.

tweets.full_text:
Nearly half of all US data centers planned for 2026 have been delayed or canceled. 

Out of 12 GW of AI data center capacity announced for this year, only about 5 GW is actually under construction. The rest is stalled. The bottleneck isn't money. Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft have committed over $650 billion in AI infrastructure spending. The bottleneck is power.

The US power grid can't keep up. Lead times for high-voltage transformers have stretched from 12-18 months pre-2020 to 3-5 years today. A single missing transformer or piece of switchgear can halt an entire project. Data centers are being built in 18 months but the electrical infrastructure they need takes 60 months to deliver.

Tariffs are making it worse. A significant share of power delivery equipment comes from China. With tariffs adding 15-25% cost increases on critical components, projects that were already tight on budget are getting pushed back or killed entirely.

The pipeline gap extends far beyond this year. For 2027, only 6.3 GW of 21.5 GW announced has broken ground. Through 2032, more than 50 GW of announced capacity lacks firm completion dates. Even OpenAI's $500 billion Stargate project has seen no significant physical progress as of April.

Community opposition is growing too. Residents in Virginia, Georgia, and Texas are pushing back on water usage, noise, and local grid strain. Projects are being canceled at the county level.

The AI demand is real. The infrastructure to support it is not materializing fast enough. Capital cannot outrun physics.

tweets.full_text:
TSMC just announced 70 percent annual growth in 2nm chip capacity through 2028. Every major AI company is fighting for allocation. This is why India's semiconductor timing matters.

When TSMC is capacity-constrained at the leading edge, the rest of the supply chain becomes critical. Packaging, testing, assembly, older-node fabs — this is exactly where India is building. Micron ATMP in Sanand. Tata OSAT in Assam. CG Semi packaging in Gujarat.

India is not competing for 2nm. India is positioning itself as the second layer of the global semiconductor supply chain — the layer that every 2nm chip eventually passes through for packaging and integration.

The global chip industry will be worth 1 trillion dollars by 2030. India's target is 100 billion in domestic semiconductor revenue. Even at 10 percent of the global market, that is transformational for Indian manufacturing.

TSMC's capacity crunch is India's opportunity window. When the world's largest chipmaker cannot meet demand, supply chain diversification stops being optional. India is the only democracy with scale, engineering talent, and government capital offering an alternative.

🚨 BOOM! BERNIE SANDERS CAUGHT COZYING UP TO CHINESE AI RESEARCHERS AS BEIJING RACES TO DOMINATE AMERICA!

Republicans are NOT holding back.

tweets.full_text:
今日の決算発表に動いている銘柄🇺🇸

強い銘柄💪

1 $STX Seagate
AI・クラウド向けストレージ需要が強く、売上・EPSともに予想超え。次四半期見通しも強く、$WDC $SNDK $MU にも波及。

2 $NXPI NXP Semiconductors
売上+12%。車載・産業向けの回復に加え、次四半期ガイダンスが予想超え。

3 $BE Bloom Energy
売上+130%、通期見通しも上方修正。AIデータセンター向け電力テーマで強い反応。

4 $SBUX Starbucks
既存店売上+6.2%、EPSも予想超え。通期見通しも引き上げ、ターンアラウンド期待。

5 $V Visa
売上+17%、非GAAP EPS 3.31ドル。200億ドルの自社株買いも発表し、決済需要の底堅さを確認。

弱い銘柄

1 $HOOD Robinhood
暗号資産収入が前年比47%減。取引関連収入も予想未達で売り。

2 $BKNG Booking Holdings
決算自体は悪くないが、中東情勢の影響で通期売上成長見通しを引き下げ。

2026年度Q1決算を発表‼️
AIインフラ投資とデータセンター需要が業績を牽引🤖
売上高・残存履行義務が過去最高を更新📈
株価は+3.6%上昇🚀

🔸FY26 Q1業績
⭕️EPS: 6.84ドル(予想5.90ドル)
⭕️売上高: 46.3億ドル(予想42.0億ドル)
📈売上高成長率: +19.7% Y/Y
📈オーガニック売上高成長率: +16.8% Y/Y（買収・英国事業売却影響を除く）

🔸FY26 通期ガイダンス（上方修正）
⭕️EPS: 28.25〜29.75ドル（予想28.25ドル、前回: 27.25〜29.25ドル）
⭕️売上高: 185.0億〜192.5億ドル（予想181.4億ドル、前回: 177.5億〜185.0億ドル）

🔸残存履行義務（RPO）：過去最高更新
📈RPO: 156.2億ドル（前年比+32.9%、前四半期末比+17.9%）
✔️前年同期比: +38.7億ドル増
✔️前四半期末(2025年12月末)比: +23.7億ドル増
✔️成長が顕著なセクター: ネットワーク＆通信、水道・下水処理、教育・公共施設、医療

🔸セグメント別売上高（Q1 2026）
📈米国電気工事・施設サービス: 14.47億ドル(+33.1% Y/Y)
📈米国機械工事・施設サービス: 20.26億ドル(+28.9% Y/Y)
📈米国ビルディングサービス: 7.73億ドル(+4.0% Y/Y)
📈米国産業サービス: 3.82億ドル(+6.4% Y/Y)
✔️英国ビルディングサービス: 記載なし（2025年12月1日に英国事業を売却済み）

🔸セグメント別営業利益率（Q1 2026）
✔️米国電気工事・施設サービス: 12.1%（前年12.5%）
✔️米国機械工事・施設サービス: 10.9%（前年11.9%）
✔️米国ビルディングサービス: 5.2%（前年4.9%）
✔️米国産業サービス: 3.3%（前年1.9%）

🔸財務状況（バランスシート）
💰現金・現金同等物: 9.16億ドル
✔️運転資本: 12.53億ドル（前四半期末10.72億ドルから増加）
✔️総負債: 605万ドル（実質無借金経営）
✔️株主資本: 38.68億ドル
✔️負債資本比率: 0.2%

🔸キャッシュフロー
✔️営業キャッシュフロー: 558万ドル（運転資本拡大に伴う季節的変動）
✔️設備投資: 2,871万ドル
✔️自社株買い: 8,711万ドル
✔️配当支払い: 1,781万ドル（1株当たり0.40ドル、前年0.25ドルから増配）

🔸会社概要
EMCOR GroupはFortune 500企業、S&P 500構成銘柄。
機械・電気工事サービス、産業・エネルギーインフラ、ビルディングサービス分野のリーディングカンパニー。
データセンター、医療施設、公共インフラなど、複雑かつミッションクリティカルなプロジェクトを全米で展開しています。

tweets.full_text:
💖🧡💚 話題の【HappyHorse 1.0】Pollo AIからもリリース🐴 💚🧡💖

PolloAI の Happy Horse 1.0 で遊んでみたよっ🐎💕
Seedance 2.0 キラーと噂の期待のAI動画モデル❣️
同じプロンプトでシーダンスと比べっこする動画作ったから
実力のほどを確かめてみてね👀✨

＜今回のお題＞
オリキャラ「萌奈」ウマウマver🐴🥕を
@PolloAIJP の HappyHorse 1.0 と Seedance 2.0 で同じプロンプトから動かしたよっ💖

＜比較した3シーン＞
💟 アイドル風パフォーマンス🎤
　→ ターン・ウインク・投げキッスの「かわいさ表現力」
💟 全力疾走🏃‍♀️💨
　→ 走りの躍動感・髪やフリルの物理演出
💟 Vlog風おさんぽ📱
　→ カメラ追従の自然さ・日常芝居の繊細さ

＜正直な感想＞
率直に言うと・・・
現時点ではSeedance 2.0のほうがクオリティは上かな🤔
特に走りの物理演出と表情の切り替えの自然さに差が出たよ

でもね❣️これ "バージョン1.0" なんだよ・・・✨
v1.0でこの品質出してるなら
バージョンを重ねたらSeedance 2.0にとっても
ガチ脅威ライバルモデルになるのは間違いないと思う❣️
AI動画の世界はほんとにスピードが速いから今後が楽しみっ✨

＜PolloAIの良いところ＞
そう考えると @PolloAIJP の強みって
「ひとつのプラットフォームでいろんなモデルを使い比べられる」ことだと思うっ💖
HappyHorseもSeedanceも全部ここで試せるから
今いちばん自分に合うモデルをすぐ見つけられるのが便利❣️

サイトのURLはリプ欄に置いてるから、
よかったら Pollo AI で遊んでみてね❣️

tweets.full_text:
【革命】1枚で700Bモデルが動く！？Skymizer「HTX301」が凄すぎる
台湾のSkymizer社が、超巨大LLMをたった1枚のカードで推論できる革新的なアーキテクチャを発表しました！✨

PCIeカード1枚に「HTX301」チップを6基搭載し、驚異の384GBメモリを実装。消費電力もわずか240W程度に抑えられています。

最大の特徴は「適材適所」の役割分担です。
・Prefill（入力処理）：GPUが担当
・Decode（文字生成）：HTX301が担当

この仕組みにより、本来なら数千万円規模の機材が必要な7000億パラメータ級の巨大モデルを、たった1枚で動かせる可能性があります。ローカルAIの常識を覆す歴史的な転換点になりそうです！🚀

#AI #LLM
